note: Backport of v10 session (2026-04-22) converged final iteration (iter-21). Variance-check 3/3 valid runs on Modal B200 CUDA 13.2 (v10 sub-env) after iter-21: 75.61 +/- 0.015x (CV 0.0%), per-T CV <=0.1%. AB-compare same-Modal-container vs saved iter-0 baseline trajectory (2 runs): +0.271x and +0.279x = +0.275x mean (+0.36%). All T buckets directionally positive on 2-run mean; T>=6 robustly +0.3-0.4x. Promote to archive anchor only after a fresh cold-start spawn reproduces the +0.27x signal cross-container.

kernel_env.tilelang: installed via `pip install tilelang --no-deps` on top of official image

ab_compares_vs_v6.note: T=1 is a single workload; single-workload bucket noise amplifies here. T>=6 are each 3 workloads, more stable.

deltas_vs_v6_summary.per_T_mean_robust: T=6 +0.32x, T=7 +0.29x, T=8 +0.39x — robustly positive. T=1,2 directionally positive but single-workload noise means individual bucket sign can flip.
deltas_vs_v6_summary.decomposition: roughly +0.22x from iter-5 (NI=1 fastpath on TileLang fwd) + roughly +0.05x from merging only the TileLang-path reduce pass 2+3 (Triton path's merge regressed T=1/2 by -1x and was reverted in iter-21).

variance_check_final.note: Absolute score ties v6 anchor (75.60) within drift — but AB-compare drift-cancelled delta is +0.27x. Cross-container validation via fresh spawn still recommended before anchor promotion.

obsolete_claim: Earlier iteration of this variant (committed as 3e03545 in AKO4FIB) shipped iter-19 code with merged reduce on BOTH paths. AB-compare of that state vs iter-0 showed -0.18x (T=1/2 regressed ~1x, T>=6 still had +0.3-0.45x). Rollback of Triton-path merge (iter-21, committed as 37affb9) fixed this.
